docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF REMARKS: THE RESPONDENT WAS SERVED INFRONT OF CITY HALL ROOM #456. SERVED NOV-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, ALICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PANYA SUKPHRANEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALICE YAN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUKPHRANEE, PANYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAN, ALICE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, ALICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,150.00 FILED BY SUKPHRANEE, PANYA AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, ALICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
